arts.ttl: Juventus and Milan battle for Kolo Muani
arts.sum: As Juventus and AC Milan prepare to face each other in the Supercoppa Italiana semi-final at the King Saud University Stadium in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, their rivalry extends beyond the pitch and into the transfer market. Both clubs have set their sights on Paris Saint-Germain's out-of-favour striker, Randal Kolo Muani. The post Juventus and Milan battle for Kolo Muani appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: SuperCoppa Italiana | Juventus v Milan: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Juventus prepares for the Supercoppa Italiana, the club's injury situation has shown signs of improvement. While Arkadiusz Milik, Bremer, and Juan Cabal remain sidelined, the team has received a boost with Jonas Rouhi and Timothy Weah returning to training. Additionally, Douglas Luiz has recently recovered from his latest injury setback. The post SuperCoppa Italiana | Juventus v Milan: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.
